subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest my dwelling-place in the serpent's mouth and hearest my cry from this darksome well [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک یا الهی تری مقری فی فم الثعبان و تسمع ضجیجی فی هذا البئر الظلماء و
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
